data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for automatic hold expiry and seat release.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement of automatic hold expiry and seat release, but there is no direct evidence provided that confirms this functionality. The linked use case describes the need for automatic hold expiry and seat release, yet the prior steps do not include any checks or reads that demonstrate this requirement is satisfied. This lack of concrete evidence leads to the conclusion that the exploratory step cannot be validated as either satisfied or unsatisfied.
gaps: No evidence of automatic hold expiry and seat release validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
